# reposummary CLI Reference

Generate a Markdown journal of a git repository's activity over a time window.

Version: dev

## Commands

- [summarize](cli-summarize.html) -- Extract a git repository's activity over a time window and render a Markdown journal, optionally narrated by an LLM.
